summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Infæmous Freight MVP. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend UI mostly working with some integration issues around authentication persistence and load display.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire quickly causing redirects to sign-in page when accessing protected routes
Loads page shows empty state even when loads exist in backend
Clicking on load cards doesn't properly navigate to load detail pages

integration_issues.issue: Authentication required message appears when trying to post loads after successful registration
Frontend not properly displaying loads that exist in backend API

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and CTAs
Browse loads page structure and filters
Post load form structure and fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication persistence issue causing session expiration on protected routes. Fix load display integration between frontend and backend - loads exist in API but not showing in UI. Test and fix load detail page navigation.
